message:
feat(auth): add token-based authentication for all connections

Require valid tokens for HTTP, WebSocket (control, H264, file transfer)
connections. Server generates admin share link and editor session token
at startup, printing percent-encoded URLs.

Key changes:
- auth.zig: remove auth_required bypass, add decodeToken (caller-provided
  buffer for thread safety), percentEncodeToken for URL-safe output,
  0o600 file permissions for auth.json
- http_server.zig: auth check on all HTTP requests, comptime-inline
  client.js into index.html to avoid unauthenticated sub-resource fetches
- main.zig: wire auth to HTTP server, auth checks on WS connect handlers,
  fix memory leak (deinit connection_sessions/panel_assignments),
  percent-encode tokens in printed URLs
- Client: add getAuthUrl/getAuthQuery for authenticated sub-resource
  fetches (WASM, workers, config), editors stay in main mode (only
  read-only viewers use viewer mode)
